_comment: Import this config before loading any synthetic test fixtures. The standard fixtures (synthetic-array, synthetic-wcs, synthetic-broker) use MSG_TYPE_* constants and standard IPC calls that resolve automatically with no config. The synthetic-titan fixture uses a custom IPC bus with non-standard TITAN_MSG_* constants that require the patterns below.

customPatterns.name: titan_send_message
customPatterns.notes: TITAN bus send path. Arg 2 is a TITAN_MSG_* constant (Strategy A); arg 4 is a typed data pointer — infer struct from the enclosing wrapper function parameter (Strategy B).

customPatterns.name: titan_recv_message
customPatterns.notes: TITAN bus receive path. Arg 4 is the typed output buffer; Strategy B infers the struct from the wrapper function's parameter type.
